/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libmecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/mecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/mecanumbot_msgs/msg/sensor_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/mecanumbot_msgs/msg/access_motor_cmd__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/mecanumbot_msgs/msg/open_cr_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/mecanumbot_msgs/srv/get_led_status__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/mecanumbot_msgs/srv/set_led_status__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
